summary: Verified Dashboard, Messages, and Invoices shared components for Doula and Midwife roles. All pages load correctly with role-specific colors, stats, and configurations.

ui_bugs.issue: Profile avatar button testID='profile-avatar-btn' not being rendered as data-testid in React Native Web - users can still navigate via Profile tab in bottom nav

critical_code_review_comments: Thin wrapper pattern is well implemented - doula/midwife dashboards are only 7 lines each
ProviderConfig correctly maps all role-specific settings (colors, endpoints, stats, quick actions, tips)
42% line reduction achieved (3,576 -> 2,056 lines) as noted in the request
All data-testid attributes present except profile avatar button which uses testID (React Native prop)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard, Messages, and Invoices all use shared ProviderX components with thin wrappers. Config-based approach is working correctly for role-specific customization.
flows_verified: ✓ Doula Dashboard - Shows 'Hello, Test' + 'Doula Dashboard' title in lavender color
✓ Doula Dashboard - 4 stat cards: Active Clients (2), Upcoming Appts (0), Pending Contracts (0), Pending Invoices (1)
✓ Doula Dashboard - 4 Quick Actions: See Clients, New Contract, New Invoice, Appointments
✓ Doula Dashboard - Doula Tip card with role-specific text
✓ Doula Messages - Shows conversation with 'Test Mom Msg' (MOM badge), lavender + button
✓ Doula Invoices - Status filters (All/Draft/Sent/Paid/Cancelled), multiple invoices with Edit/Send/Delete actions
✓ Doula Profile - Accessible via bottom nav tab
✓ Midwife Dashboard - Shows 'Hello, Test' + 'Midwife Dashboard' title in green color
✓ Midwife Dashboard - 4 stat cards: Prenatal Clients (1), Upcoming Appts (0), Visits This Month (0), Births This Month (0)
✓ Midwife Dashboard - 4 Quick Actions: Add Client, Add Visit, Birth Summary, Appointments
✓ Midwife Dashboard - Midwifery Tools tip card
✓ Midwife Messages - Shows 'No messages yet' empty state with green + button
✓ Midwife Invoices - Status filters present, multiple invoices with various statuses

ProviderDashboard.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender theme, 4 stats, 4 actions, Doula Tip
ProviderDashboard.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green theme, 4 midwife-specific stats, 4 actions, Midwifery Tools tip

ProviderMessages.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - lavender + button, conversation with MOM user
ProviderMessages.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - green + button, empty state displayed

ProviderInvoices.doula: Loaded with DOULA_CONFIG - status filters, invoice list with actions
ProviderInvoices.midwife: Loaded with MIDWIFE_CONFIG - status filters, invoice list with actions

color_verification.doula: #9F83B6 (lavender) - confirmed in Dashboard title and stat cards
color_verification.midwife: #8CAF8C (green) - confirmed in Dashboard title and stat cards
